conversation.content: Let's learn about a law in Azeroth. Today we are going to understand the Ratchet Trade Reputation Protection Law. Unlike regular commercial laws, its restrictions on reputation and speech are very strict.
My notebook is ready, let's begin.

The core rule of this law is: those who publicly defame trade agreements will be fined 100 gold coins, and required to post a letter of repentance at the tavern door for three days, while being prohibited from engaging in trading activities within the Chamber of Commerce's jurisdiction for six months; if the defamatory content spreads widely, the fine will increase to 500 gold coins and they will be expelled from Ratchet.
I have written down the core penalty standards of this law.
Its application scenario is: all taverns and Chamber of Commerce premises in Ratchet.
Okay, I understand the application scenario of this law.
